uses: Sarcoyucca schottii, also known as Pima Yucca or Adam's needle, has been utilized in traditional medicine by Native American communities. intro: Sarcoyucca schottii, also known as the Joshua tree yucca or Schott's yucca, is a species of yucca plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico.
